name: Little Library
short_description: Build a brand-new library in a quaint village! Meet quirky villagers, recommend books, unlock rare titles, organize displays, host events, uncover the village's history, and revitalize the community in this cozy library-management game!
detailed_description:
You have moved to the quaint village of Maplewood, tasked with running a brand-new library to help restore a struggling community. But revitalizing the library isn’t easy, and funding is tight. To make ends meet, you’ll need to carefully manage resources, grow the collection, and host events to bring the villagers together.

Beyond the library, you’ll cultivate a quiet life in the village—tending to a small farm, fishing in the local waters, exploring the Whispering Woods, engaging in community projects, and forming deep connections with the townspeople. From aspiring writers to world travelers, every villager has a role to play in Maplewood’s revival. As you uncover pieces of the village’s forgotten past, you’ll shape its future. Can you transform the library into the heart of the community before the Folk Festival?

Features:

📚 Build and manage the library – Watch it grow from a humble collection to a thriving center of the village.

📖 Expand the library’s collection – There are over 70 books to collect, including rare and collectible titles that enhance your display and boost the library’s reputation.

🏡 Tend to your own farm – Grow crops to supplement your income, trade with villagers, and add a touch of rural charm to your new life in Maplewood.

🎣 Go fishing in the village waters – Cast your line in ponds and lakes to catch fish, earn extra income, and even complete special requests from villagers.

🌲 Explore the Whispering Woods – Venture into the mysterious forest on the village’s outskirts, where secrets await.

🔍 Uncover the village’s history – Expand the Local History section of the library and piece together Maplewood’s past.

🤝 Connect with the villagers – Befriend the townspeople, build relationships, and even find romance as you become a part of their lives.

🎭 Engage in community events – Host book clubs and bring the village together through literary and social activities.

🔄 Replay for new outcomes – Your choices influence friendships, romances, and the village’s future, offering a fresh experience with every playthrough.

Will you build a library that stands the test of time and rekindle the spirit of Maplewood?
